app.description: The generated operational app is itself managed by ConfigHub.
app.name: Add-on Manager

auth.oauthClient: ConfigHub browser OAuth client required for live app mode.

configHub.variantMechanics: Use ConfigHub Variant spaces for dev, stage, prod, and any customer or fleet overlays.

delivery.route: ConfigHub app config -> OCI artifact -> Argo -> Kubernetes

fleet.model: Repeat the same app component across orgs, clusters, or customer Variants with per-Variant config overlays.

lifecycle.note: The domain loop (preflight through receipt) is the app's job; these commands are the app's own life.

requires: approved app version or config change

proofRequired: Variant promotion or explicit Variant config revision
stopRule: Repo-local app code is not live proof. Keep this app in WATCH until ConfigHub, controller, runtime, URL, and receipt evidence exist for the app itself.

variants.purpose: Pre-production proof with browser OAuth and ConfigHub read paths.
